mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.account_id AS accountId, u.dept_id AS deptId, d.tenant_id AS deptTenantId, d.dept_category AS deptCategory, d.dept_type AS deptType, r.role_id AS roleId, r.role_key AS roleKey, COALESCE(ur.effective_data_scope, r.fixed_data_scope, r.default_data_scope) AS effectiveDataScope FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.dept_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id AND r.status = '0' WHERE u.account_id = #{accountId} AND u.user_id = #{userId} AND u.status = '0' LIMIT 1

SELECT c.uid AS uid, c.account_id AS accountId, c.auth_level AS authLevel FROM c_user c INNER JOIN t_account a ON c.account_id = a.account_id WHERE c.account_id = #{accountId} AND c.uid = #{uid} LIMIT 1
SELECT real_name AS realNameCipher, id_card_encrypted AS idCardCipher FROM t_account WHERE account_id = #{accountId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE t_account SET real_name_verified = 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE account_id = #{accountId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_owner_face_auth_attestation ( uid, account_id, provider, provider_request_id, provider_result, verified, auth_level_after ) VALUES ( #{uid}, #{accountId}, #{provider}, #{providerRequestId}, #{providerResult}, #{verified}, #{authLevelAfter} )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT building_id FROM ( SELECT ub.building_id FROM sys_user_building ub WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND ub.status = 1 UNION SELECT dbs.building_id FROM sys_dept_building_scope dbs JOIN ( SELECT ugds.grid_dept_id AS dept_id FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = #{userId} AND ugds.status = 1 UNION SELECT u.dept_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = u.user_id AND ugds.status = 1 ) ) grid_dept ON grid_dept.dept_id = dbs.dept_id JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = #{userId} JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_key = 'GRID_MEMBER' AND dbs.status = 1 ) scoped ORDER BY building_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT tenant_id AS tenantId, building_id AS buildingId FROM ( SELECT ub.tenant_id, ub.building_id FROM sys_user_building ub WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} AND ub.status = 1 UNION SELECT dbs.tenant_id, dbs.building_id FROM sys_dept_building_scope dbs JOIN ( SELECT ugds.grid_dept_id AS dept_id FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = #{userId} AND ugds.status = 1 UNION SELECT u.dept_id FROM sys_user u WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sys_user_grid_dept_scope ugds WHERE ugds.user_id = u.user_id AND ugds.status = 1 ) ) grid_dept ON grid_dept.dept_id = dbs.dept_id JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = #{userId} JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = u.user_id JOIN sys_role r ON r.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_key = 'GRID_MEMBER' AND dbs.status = 1 ) scoped ORDER BY tenant_id ASC, building_id ASC
SELECT tenant_id FROM c_owner_property WHERE uid = #{uid} AND account_status = 1 ORDER BY opid ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: SELECT dts.tenant_id FROM sys_dept_tenant_scope dts JOIN sys_dept d ON d.dept_id = dts.dept_id WHERE dts.status = 1 AND d.status = '0' AND ( d.dept_id = #{deptId} OR d.ancestors = CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) OR d.ancestors LIKE CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) || ',%' OR d.ancestors LIKE '%,' || CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) OR d.ancestors LIKE '%,' || CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) || ',%' ) UNION SELECT d.tenant_id FROM sys_dept d WHERE d.tenant_id IS NOT NULL AND d.status = '0' AND ( d.dept_id = #{deptId} OR d.ancestors = CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) OR d.ancestors LIKE CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) || ',%' OR d.ancestors LIKE '%,' || CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) OR d.ancestors LIKE '%,' || CAST(#{deptId} AS VARCHAR) || ',%' )
mapper.select:
SELECT scoped.tenant_id FROM (
) scoped JOIN t_tenant_community community ON community.tenant_id = scoped.tenant_id WHERE community.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY scoped.tenant_id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT DISTINCT community.tenant_id AS tenantId, community.tenant_name AS tenantName, community.planned_household_count AS plannedHouseholdCount, community.total_exclusive_area AS totalExclusiveArea, community.governance_status AS governanceStatus FROM t_tenant_community community JOIN (
) scoped ON scoped.tenant_id = community.tenant_id WHERE community.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY community.tenant_name ASC, community.tenant_id ASC
